creator: raul@b2n.org
text:
As per mattermost security policy, details about the security fixes included in this new version will be disclosed tomorrow, 30 days after releasing the new version. Not sure about the correctness of this patches, but they are working here.

https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server/releases/tag/v5.11.0

https://mattermost.com/security-updates/
